creator: rterlaare@wanadoo.nl
text:
Hi

I encountered a problem while upgrading to ORBit2 2.14.4

on FreeBSD 6 stable version, i386 platform

bad link? ftp shows this directory contents:

/pub/FreeBSD/ports/i386/packages-6-stable/Latest
lrwxr-xr-x   1 ftpuser  ftpusers        24 Oct 29 01:01 ORBit2.tbz -> ../All/ORBit2-2.14.3.tbz

/pub/FreeBSD/ports/i386/packages-6-stable/All
-rw-r--r--   1 ftpuser  ftpusers    406983 Dec 26 03:56 ORBit2-2.14.4.tbz

with regards

Ruud ter Laare

Thx for providing one of the best PC Operating systems

Happy newyear
